author: anon-59ff128d
content: Starting work on validate_op refactoring. Plan: (1) Extract validate_find_and_regex() helper for the common find-empty + regex check shared by all 9 arms, (2) Extract validate_required_field() helper for the content-empty checks used by insert_after/insert_before/replace_line, (3) Keep variant-specific checks (surround prefix/suffix, replace's empty-replacement allowance) inline, (4) Preserve the wildcard arm for unknown variants.
